debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
x y : α
h✝ : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
h : G.Adj x y
⊢ Matroid.Series (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x y

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hAdj
  have hne := he.ne
  have hx := he.mem_vertex_left
  have hy := he.mem_vertex_right
  
  -- We show {x, y} is a cocircuit, which implies Series for non-coloops.
  -- Since x and y are not coloops, this is equivalent to showing E \ {x, y} is a hyperplane.
  -- This requires showing r(E \ {x, y}) = r(E) - 1.
  
  let M := G.matchingMatroid
  let K := V(G) \ {x, y}
  
  have h_rk : M.eRk K = M.eRank - 1 := by
    apply le_antisymm
    · -- r(K) ≤ r(E) - 1
      -- If r(K) ≥ r(E), there is a matching avoiding x and y with size ν(G).
      -- Augmenting with e gives a larger matching, contradiction.
      by_contra h_contra
      rw [not_le] at h_contra
      have h_eq : M.eRk K = M.eRank := le_antisymm (M.eRk_le_eRank K) (le_trans (ENat.sub_one_lt_iff.mp h_contra).le (by simp)) 
      obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := M.exists_basis K
      obtain ⟨Mat, hMat, hsub⟩ := hI.indep
      have hMax : G.IsMaxMatching Mat := by
        rw [← hI.encard, h_eq] at hsub
        exact ⟨hMat, fun M' hM' ↦ (M.eRk_le_eRank_of_subset _ (by simp)).trans_eq (hI.encard.symm.trans h_eq)⟩ 
      -- Construct augmented matching
      let Mat' := Mat ∪ {e}
      have hMat' : G.IsMatching Mat' := by
        refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hMat.subset, ?_⟩
        simp only [Mat', mem_union, mem_singleton_iff, forall_eq_or_imp, forall_eq, true_and]
        refine ⟨fun f hf hne ↦ ?_, fun f hf hne ↦ ?_, hMat.disjoint⟩
        · rw [disjoint_comm]; apply Disjoint.mono_left (hsub ·)
          rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
          rintro v hv; rw [he.mem_vertices_iff] at hv
          obtain (rfl|rfl) := hv <;> exact (hI.subset hv).2 (by simp)
        · apply Disjoint.mono_left (hsub ·)
          rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
          rintro v hv; rw [he.mem_vertices_iff] at hv
          obtain (rfl|rfl) := hv <;> exact (hI.subset hv).2 (by simp)
      have h_lt : Mat.encard < Mat'.encard := by
        rw [encard_union_eq, encard_singleton, add_comm]
        exact disjoint_singleton_right.mpr (fun heM ↦ (hI.subset (hsub heM)).2 (by simp [he.mem_edge])) 
      exact h_lt.not_le (hMax.max Mat' hMat')

    · -- r(K) ≥ r(E) - 1
      -- Take max matching avoiding y. It must cover x.
      -- Removing x gives matchable set in K of size r(E) - 1.
      obtain ⟨My, hMy, hym⟩ := (h y).exists_isMaxMatching_not_mem
      by_cases hxm : x ∈ V(G, My)
      · refine le_trans (le_of_eq ?_) (M.eRk_mono (diff_subset_diff_left (subset_diff.mpr ⟨hMy.toIsMatching.subset_ground, disjoint_singleton_right.mpr hym⟩)))
        rw [M.encard_eq_eRk_of_indep (hMy.toIsMatching.indep_subset_vertices (subset_refl _)), encard_diff_singleton hxm, hMy.encard]
      · -- If My avoids x, augment
        exfalso
        let Mat' := My ∪ {e}
        have hMat' : G.IsMatching Mat' := by
          refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hMy.toIsMatching.subset, ?_⟩
          simp only [Mat', mem_union, mem_singleton_iff, forall_eq_or_imp, forall_eq, true_and]
          refine ⟨fun f hf hne ↦ ?_, fun f hf hne ↦ ?_, hMy.disjoint⟩
          · rw [disjoint_comm]; apply Disjoint.mono_left (hMy.toIsMatching.subset_vertices (subset_refl _) ·)
            rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
            rintro v hv; rw [he.mem_vertices_iff] at hv
            obtain (rfl|rfl) := hv <;> assumption 
          · apply Disjoint.mono_left (hMy.toIsMatching.subset_vertices (subset_refl _) ·)
            rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
            rintro v hv; rw [he.mem_vertices_iff] at hv
            obtain (rfl|rfl) := hv <;> assumption 
        exact (encard_union_le _ _).not_lt (hMy.max Mat' hMat' |>.trans_lt (by 
           rw [encard_union_eq, encard_singleton, add_comm]
           exact ENat.lt_add_one (hMy.encard_ne_top)
           rw [disjoint_singleton_right]; exact fun h ↦ hxm (hMy.toIsMatching.subset_vertices (subset_refl _) h)))

  -- K is a hyperplane
  have h_hyp : M.Hyperplane K := by
    rw [Matroid.hyperplane_iff_maximal_proper_flat, Matroid.flat_iff_closure_self]
    refine ⟨⟨M.eRk_lt_eRank_iff.mp (by rw [h_rk]; exact ENat.sub_one_lt_of_lt_top M.eRank_ne_top), ?_⟩, ?_⟩
    · rw [subset_antisymm_iff, and_iff_right (M.subset_closure K)]
      rintro z hz
      by_contra hzk
      -- If z ∈ cl(K) \ K, then z = x or z = y.
      -- If z = x, then r(K ∪ x) = r(K).
      -- But r(K ∪ x) = r(E \ y) = r(E) (by inessential y).
      -- r(K) = r(E) - 1. Contradiction.
      have hz_in : z ∈ {x, y} := by simpa [K] using hzk
      simp only [mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at hz_in
      have h_rk_z : M.eRk (insert z K) = M.eRank := by
        obtain (rfl|rfl) := hz_in
        · rw [insert_diff_singleton, M.eRk_eq_eRank_iff]
          exact ⟨matchingMatroid.noColoop h hy, diff_subset⟩
        · rw [← insert_diff_singleton_comm (by exact hne.symm), insert_diff_singleton, M.eRk_eq_eRank_iff]
          exact ⟨matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx, diff_subset⟩
      rw [← M.eRk_closure_eq] at h_rk_z
      have h_lt := M.eRk_le_eRk_of_subset (insert_subset hz (M.subset_closure K))
      rw [h_rk_z, M.eRk_closure_eq, h_rk] at h_lt
      exact (ENat.sub_one_lt_of_lt_top M.eRank_ne_top).ne h_lt
    · -- Maximality
      rintro Y hY hKY
      have h_rkY : M.eRk Y = M.eRank := by
        obtain ⟨z, hzY, hzk⟩ := exists_of_ssubset hKY
        have hz_in : z ∈ {x, y} := by simpa [K] using hzk
        obtain (rfl|rfl) := hz_in
        · apply le_antisymm (M.eRk_le_eRank Y)
          rw [← M.eRk_eq_eRank_iff.mpr ⟨matchingMatroid.noColoop h hy, diff_subset⟩]
          apply M.eRk_mono; rw [insert_diff_singleton]; exact (insert_subset hzY hY.subset)
        · apply le_antisymm (M.eRk_le_eRank Y)
          rw [← M.eRk_eq_eRank_iff.mpr ⟨matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx, diff_subset⟩]
          apply M.eRk_mono; rw [← insert_diff_singleton_comm (by exact hne.symm), insert_diff_singleton]; exact (insert_subset hzY hY.subset)
      rwa [Matroid.flat_iff_eRk_eq_eRank] at hY

  rw [Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit hne (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx) (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hy)]
  rwa [Matroid.cocircuit_iff_mem_hyperplane_compl, mem_diff, mem_diff, not_not, not_not]
